description_long: This is a camouflage-patterned hat with a wide, flat brim and a tall, cylindrical crown. The hat features a digital woodland camouflage print in shades of green, brown, and black, giving it a rugged, outdoor appearance. On the front of the crown, there is a prominent green fleur-de-lis emblem, which stands out against the camo background. The brim is broad and slightly floppy, providing ample shade and coverage. The material appears to be a soft, flexible fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, suitable for casual or outdoor urban wear. The overall construction suggests comfort and practicality, with a touch of decorative flair from the emblem.
description: A wide-brimmed, camouflage-patterned hat with a tall crown and a green fleur-de-lis emblem on the front. The hat is made of soft, flexible fabric and designed for outdoor or casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camouflage pattern and a green fleur-de-lis emblem centered on the crown.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous camo pattern and the hat's broad, flat brim with no visible emblem.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted camouflage print and the tall, cylindrical crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same camo pattern and wide brim, emblem not visible.
